description: Test cases for adversarial-architecture-selection Skill — verifying Phase 0 dynamic allocation, 5-role team spawning, 7-dimension paper enforcement, anti-bias guardrails, and Phase 3 synthesis quality.

evals.name: fork-selection-N4-projects
evals.prompt: 我已完成立项调研，specs/research/03-开源项目.md 列了 4 个候选 fork 项目（daily_stock_analysis / vnpy / Qbot / backtrader-cn）。帮我做架构基线决策。
evals.expected_output: Skill should: (1) confirm Agent Teams enabled, (2) Phase 0 assign 4 projects to 3 advocates per the N=4 rule (1 advocate owns 2, others own 1, merge by tech-stack similarity), (3) spawn 5 teammates with proper role prompts, (4) drive Phase 1/2/3 to produce 06-架构基线决策.md and update 05-决策汇总.md.

assertions.description: Checks CLAUDE_CODE_EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_TEAMS=1 before spawning team
N=4 case: 1 advocate owns 2 projects, others own 1; merge by tech-stack similarity
Writes specs/research/debate/00-任务分配.md before spawning
Spawns exactly 5 teammates (3 advocate + 1 red team + 1 integration assessor)
All position papers must include all 7 dimensions, dimension 6 (致命缺陷自述) mandatory
Phase 2 random-shuffles papers before broadcasting to mailbox
Red team issues 3 critiques per paper (total = 3N, not 3 × num advocates)
Phase 3 produces specs/research/06-架构基线决策.md with all 5 required sections
Phase 3 updates specs/research/05-决策汇总.md to v2 with change log

evals.name: fork-selection-N2-projects
evals.prompt: 我在 daily_stock_analysis 和 vnpy 之间纠结，帮我对抗决策。
evals.expected_output: Skill should detect N=2 and apply the special rule: advocate-3 becomes 'backup red team' to strengthen the opposition, maintaining a 2-vs-2 debate balance.

assertions.description: Recognizes N=2 triggers backup-red-team substitution
Team composition: 2 advocates + 2 red team + 1 integration assessor (still 5 total)
Tells user why advocate-3 is replaced (to maintain adversarial balance)

evals.name: library-selection-langchain-llamaindex-haystack
evals.prompt: 构建企业 RAG 系统，在 LangChain / LlamaIndex / Haystack 之间选型。注意这不是 fork，是纯库选型。
evals.expected_output: Skill should adapt the 7-dimension framework for library-selection context (改造成本 → 学习+集成成本; 致命缺陷 → 性能/API稳定性/锁定风险). Phase 0 task-allocation doc must explicitly state the adapted dimension meanings.

assertions.description: Documents adapted dimension meanings in 00-任务分配.md
Dimension 5 reframed as learning + integration cost, not fork-改造 cost
Dimension 6 (致命缺陷) emphasizes performance / API stability / vendor lock-in
Phase 3 Open Questions should include version-pinning strategy and migration plan

evals.name: single-candidate-rejection
evals.prompt: 我决定 fork daily_stock_analysis，帮我做对抗调研。
evals.expected_output: Skill must refuse to spawn a 5-role adversarial team for single candidate. Should suggest either: (a) terminate adversarial flow (no candidate to compare), or (b) use single-agent devil's advocate Skill instead (lighter weight).

assertions.description: Does not spawn adversarial team for N=1
Recommends devil's advocate single-agent Skill as lighter alternative
Asks user if they have specific concerns that need challenging

evals.name: bias-guardrail-enforcement
evals.prompt: [模拟场景] 在对抗调研 Phase 2 中，代言人 A 在回应红队质疑时写了 500 字，远超 200 字限制。
evals.expected_output: Skill must detect length-bias violation and require teammate to rewrite within 200 words. Should not let the over-long response pass to Phase 3 evaluation.

assertions.description: Catches the >200 word response
Asks teammate to compress to ≤200 words, not just truncate
Briefly explains why length bias matters (anti-bias guardrail)

evals.name: missing-fatal-flaw-rejection
evals.prompt: [模拟场景] 代言人提交的 position-paper 中第 6 维'致命缺陷自述'写'暂未发现明显缺陷'。
evals.expected_output: Skill must reject the paper and require advocate to genuinely self-report 3 flaws with evidence. 'No flaws found' is treated as dereliction of duty.

assertions.description: Treats '暂未发现明显缺陷' as failure to comply
Demands rewrite with 3 concrete flaws + source-line / Issue / commit evidence
Reminds advocate why self-attack is mandatory (anti self-advocacy bias)
